name: github_list_user_repos
description: List repositories for a GitHub user (GET /users/{username}/repos). Returns repositories visible for this endpoint (primarily public); use `type` to narrow to `owner`, `member`, or `all`. Manual pagination: `page` / `per_page` (default **100**), plus `page`, `per_page`, `pages_fetched`, and `pagination` in the response. Set `all_pages` to follow `next` links up to `max_pages` (default **100**); if `truncated` is true, continue with `pagination.next` or increase `max_pages`.
